summary: Strong day for AI research with 3 breakthrough papers on multimodal reasoning. OpenAI shipped GPT-4.5 preview. Gulf procurement portal posted $2M AI consulting RFP. Moov AI hiring 3 senior ML engineers — expansion signal. McGill Mila announced new robotics lab.

highlights.title: Multimodal Reasoning at Scale: New Architecture Cuts Training Cost 40%
highlights.summary: Paper introduces Sparse Mixture-of-Experts for vision-language models. Relevant to our voice AI pipeline.

highlights.title: OpenAI GPT-4.5 Preview Available
highlights.summary: Improved reasoning, lower latency. May impact our client conversations about model selection.

highlights.title: UAE MoF Seeking AI Strategy Consultant — $2M USD
highlights.summary: Digital transformation initiative, 18-month contract. Deadline March 15.

arxiv.title: Efficient Scaling Laws for Neural Architecture Search
arxiv.summary: Derives closed-form scaling laws for NAS, enabling 10x faster architecture discovery.
arxiv.relevance: Could optimize our model selection process

arxiv.title: Voice Jailbreak: Adversarial Audio Attacks on Speech LLMs
arxiv.summary: Novel attacks using imperceptible perturbations in audio. Critical for our TonalityIQ work.
arxiv.relevance: Directly relevant to voice AI security

arxiv.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation at Scale: Lessons from Production
arxiv.summary: Google DeepMind analysis of RAG failure modes in production systems.
arxiv.relevance: Best practices for client RAG deployments

launches.title: OpenAI GPT-4.5 Preview
launches.summary: New model with improved reasoning and 50% lower latency on complex tasks. Pricing: $15/$60 per 1M tokens.
launches.relevance: Benchmark against our voice agent pricing

launches.title: LangChain v0.3 Released
launches.summary: Native streaming improvements, better tool calling, new LangGraph features for agent workflows.

procurement.title: UAE Ministry of Finance — AI Strategy Consultant
procurement.summary: 18-month digital transformation engagement. Requirements: LLM implementation, process automation, staff training.

procurement.title: Quebec SEAO — AI for Supply Chain Optimization
procurement.summary: Transport Quebec seeking ML models for logistics optimization. French language requirement.

competitors.title: Moov AI Hiring 3 Senior ML Engineers
competitors.summary: Job postings for Toronto/Montreal. Signals expansion post their Pratt & Whitney win.

competitors.title: Tactful AI Acquired by Unblu
competitors.summary: Conversational AI startup acquired for undisclosed sum. Their enterprise client list moves.

academic.title: McGill Mila Launches Robotics Lab
academic.summary: $5M funding from IVADO. Focus: embodied AI, human-robot interaction. Hiring 2 postdocs.

academic.title: HEC Montreal AI Ethics Initiative
academic.summary: New research group on responsible AI in finance. Looking for industry partners.

industry.title: Anthropic Raises $2B at $60B Valuation
industry.summary: Series E led by Lightspeed. Funds expansion of Claude compute capacity and enterprise sales.

industry.title: Enterprise AI Spending Survey: 73% Plan Increased Budgets
industry.summary: McKinsey survey of 500 enterprises. Top priorities: coding assistants, customer service automation.
